onboarding.step1Body: Earn points on every visit, redeem exclusive rewards and level up. All in one place.
onboarding.step2Body: Every time you visit, you automatically earn points. The more you come, the more benefits you unlock.
onboarding.step3Body: Turn your points into real rewards: discounts, products, free services and more.
onboarding.step4Body: Find your personalized challenges, the leaderboard with other members and your full profile.

redemptionQR.showCode: Show this code when you arrive

install.title: Install app
install.description: Add to your home screen for quick access, even offline.

rewards.title: Rewards
rewards.canRedeem: You can redeem {count} reward{s} with your current points.
rewards.redeemNote: Redemptions apply on your next visit.
rewards.emptyDesc: Keep earning points to unlock benefits.

challenges.title: Challenges
challenges.subtitle: Complete challenges and earn extra points
challenges.emptyDesc: Your business hasn't created any challenges yet. Check back soon!

referrals.title: Refer friends
referrals.inactive: The referral program is not active at this business yet.
referrals.earnDesc: Share your unique link with friends and you both benefit
referrals.note: Points are credited when your friend makes their first visit to {business}.
referrals.shareText: Join {business} with my link and earn {points} points!

profile.title: My Profile
profile.name: Name
profile.deleteAccountDesc: Permanently remove your membership from this program.
profile.feedbackSent: Thank you! Your feedback was received.
profile.feedbackPlaceholder: Tell us what's on your mind…

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Enter your email and password to access.
login.errorTooMany: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment and try again.
login.errorGeneric: There was a problem signing in. Try again.

register.title: Create account
register.subtitle: Complete the details to join the loyalty program.
register.checkEmailDesc: We sent a confirmation link to {email}. Tap the link to activate your account.
register.noEmail: Didn't receive it? Check your spam folder or
register.errorEmailExists: You already have an account with this email. Sign in with your correct password.
register.errorEmailExistsShort: You already have an account with this email. Sign in.
register.errorTooMany: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment and try again.
register.errorGeneric: There was a problem creating your account. Try again.

joinCode.joinCodeNotFound: Code not found. Check with the business.
joinCode.joinCodeRequired: Enter a valid join code to continue.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot my password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.checkEmailDesc: If an account exists with {email}, you'll receive a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.errorGeneric: There was a problem sending the email. Try again.

consent.update_description: We have updated our legal documents. Please review and accept to continue.

qr_scanner.title: Scan QR Code
qr_scanner.hint: Point the camera at the business QR code
qr_scanner.camera_error: Could not access the camera. Check your browser permissions.
qr_scanner.camera_hint: Allow camera access in your browser settings and try again.

join_page.welcome_subtitle: Enter your business code to get started
join_page.code_hint: Ask the business or scan their QR code
join_page.register_subtitle: Complete your details to create your account
join_page.error_invalid_code: Invalid code. Check with your business.
join_page.error_password_min: Password must be at least 6 characters.
join_page.error_already_registered: You already have an account with this email. Enter your password.

login.subtitle: Sign in to your loyalty program
login.errorMemberships: Error loading your memberships. Try again.

leaderboard.title: Leaderboard
leaderboard.emptyDesc: The leaderboard updates weekly. Start earning points!

redemptions.title: My Redemptions
redemptions.subtitle: Show these codes to the staff
redemptions.emptyDesc: Start earning points and redeem them for rewards!

rewardDetail.confirmMessage: Confirm redeeming {pts} pts for this reward?

authReset.title: New password
authReset.subtitle: Choose a secure password for your account.
authReset.errorMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.
authReset.errorGeneric: Could not update password. The link may have expired.

authRecovery.expiredDesc: The link expired or was already used. Request a new one.

impersonation.banner: Impersonation session active — you are viewing the app as this member

offlineIndicator.message: You're offline. Some features may be limited.

offline.title: You're Offline
offline.description: Please check your internet connection and try again. Some cached content may still be available.
offline.syncedNote: Your loyalty data is synced when you're back online.

errors.rewardUnavailable: This reward is no longer available.
errors.rewardTenantMismatch: Reward not available for this business.
errors.insufficientPoints: You don't have enough points to redeem this reward.
errors.maxPerMemberReached: You've reached the redemption limit for this reward.
errors.redemptionFailed: Error processing redemption. Please try again.
